segments.text: Then Zophar the Naamathite began speaking and said,
So many words should be answered, shouldn't they? Or is a person proved right by doing a lot of talking?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Should all your babbling force people to keep quiet? When you mock, shouldn't someone make you feel ashamed?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: You said, ‘What I teach is the pure truth,’ and ‘in God's eyes I am clean.’
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: If only God would speak up and tell you directly,
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: because then he would explain to you the secrets of wisdom. True wisdom has many sides to it. God's treatment of you is far better than your guilt deserves.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Can you find out the mysteries of God? Can you discover all the wisdom of the Almighty?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: It is greater than the heavens—what can you do? It is deeper than Sheol—what can you know?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: It extends farther than the earth, and wider than the sea.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: If God comes and imprisons someone, or assembles the court for judgment, who can stop him?
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: For God knows who are deceivers—when he sees someone sin, he pays attention to it.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Stupid people will become wise when wild donkeys are born tame!
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: But if you repent and spread out your hands to pray to him,
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: if you get rid of your sins and don't let wickedness continue in your life,
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: then you would be able to hold your head high in innocence, you will be firm and unafraid.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: You will forget your misery, remembering it only as water under the bridge.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: Your life will shine brighter than the noonday sun; even darkness will be like the morning.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: You will have confidence because there is hope; you will be protected and rest in safety.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: You will lie down to sleep with no one to frighten you, and many will come asking for your favor.
segments.speaker: Zophar

segments.text: But the eyes of the wicked will fail, they will not be able to escape, and their only hope is in death.
segments.speaker: Zophar
